Campaigns

Improving Links Across Portsmouth Harbour

Caroline has a deep appreciation for the historical link which Gosport shares with Portsmouth. Connectivity across the harbour has played a vital role in...

Monitoring Haslar Immigration Removal Centre

The Home Office is still in the process of redeveloping the Haslar IRC site - which was delayed due to a number of factors including asbestos. When it reopens...

Cleaning Up Our Seas and Waterways

Caroline regularly meets with Southern Water and keeps local people updated on what she is doing to ensure that the water infrastructure is appropriate. In...

Regenerating Fort Blockhouse

Caroline has emphasised the potential of Fort Blockhouse to make a significant economic contribution to Gosport in the House of Commons Chamber on many...

Supporting Local Community Organisations
